title: phlox austromontana subsp. prostrata
intro: Phlox austromontana subsp. prostrata is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant species in the family Polemoniaceae, native to New South Wales in Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phlox austromontana subsp. prostrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
